title: DevBook Golden Dataset Generation Summary
description: Run-level counts for the shared golden dataset generation, including the single- vs multi-evidence split so the dataset's resemblance to top-K retrieval can be checked.

documentsLoaded.description: Documents read from the Mongo documents collection.

documentsWithSections.description: Documents that yielded at least one substantive section.

groups.description: Total cross-note groups prepared for query generation.

crossNoteGroups.description: Groups whose sections span more than one note.

singleEvidenceCases.description: Cases whose expected evidence is a single section (should be a minority).

multiEvidenceCases.description: Cases whose expected evidence spans two or more sections.

sourcesCovered.description: Distinct source paths referenced across all cases' expected evidence.
